name: Mexican Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the contents of the first can of bean dip into a 3 quart oblong casserole dish.
2. Pour the contents of the second can of avocado dip, frozen, over the bean dip.
3. Chop the onion and add it to the casserole.
4. Add the chopped tomatoes.
5. Sprinkle the shredded cheddar cheese on top.
6. Slice the black olives and scatter them over the top.
7. Serve with chips.
8. This dish may be made up to 24 hours in advance and refrigerated. Do not freeze.
